## Summary

- What changed and why?

## Related Issue

- Closes #
- Related #

## Change Type

- [ ] `feat` New feature
- [ ] `fix` Bug fix
- [ ] `docs` Documentation only
- [ ] `refactor` Internal cleanup (no behavior change)
- [ ] `test` Test-only change
- [ ] `ci` / `build` Pipeline or tooling

## Scope

- [ ] `gust-lang`
- [ ] `gust-runtime`
- [ ] `gust-cli`
- [ ] `gust-build`
- [ ] `gust-lsp`
- [ ] docs / examples
- [ ] GitHub workflows

## Validation

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace --all-targets --all-features`
- [ ] If codegen changed, verified generated Rust and Go output paths
- [ ] If docs changed, `cargo test -p gust-lang --test docs_snippets`

## Notes / Risks

- Any limitations, tradeoffs, or follow-up items.
